meta.name: ПАО АКБ «Приморье»
meta.conversion_note: All data extracted from МСФО consolidated reports, original currency RUB (thousands); converted to millions for JSON. No currency conversions between years needed.

source.doc_title: МСФО обобщённая консолидированная финансовая отчётность и аудиторские заключения

meta.notes: Extracted from official МСФО summary (обобщённая) consolidated financial statements. Years 2024-2025 from detailed summary; 2023 from audit report. Auditor 2024-2025: Unikon (with qualification about capital ratios); 2023 also qualified opinion. Bank under CBR oversight for capital adequacy.

data_flags: arithmetic_check_passed: total_assets ≈ total_liabilities + total_equity for all years (diff < 0.1%)
bank_status: CRITICAL & DETERIORATING - severe capital and profitability stress
net_interest_margin: NEGATIVE & WORSENING - 2023 +2.02B → 2024 -1.19B → 2025 -2.23B. Interest expenses exceed income due to high interbank borrowing costs and deposit funding pressures.
credit_quality_deterioration: provision cover increased from ~7.2% (2023) to ~4.5% (2024) to likely higher in 2025 (data redacted); absolute provisions: 2023 unknown, 2024: 156M, 2025: 573M
deposit_outflow: 2024 deposits 41.2B → 2025 deposits 33.3B (-19% YoY). Customer funding crisis signal.
loan_portfolio_collapse: 2023: 19.7B net → 2024: 22.0B → 2025: 14.8B gross (-33% from 2024). Suggests credit event or portfolio tightening.
capital_erosion_severe: equity 8.3B (2023) → 5.2B (2024) → 3.8B (2025). Losses eroding capital; subordinated debt 1.0B injected in 2025 to shore up capital ratios.
capital_ratio_violation: Auditor 2024 opinion QUALIFIED - notes CBR-sanctioned capital recovery plan. Bank breaching capital adequacy thresholds (per note 31 in 2024 report).
funding_stress: Due to banks stable at 36-37B but customer funding collapsing → increasing reliance on CBR/interbank liquidity, likely at high cost.
securities_portfolio: 2025 shows shift from FVOCI (12.8B → 0.7B) to amortized cost (37.6B → 49.5B), likely government bonds for safety/yield.
tax_dynamics: 2023 benefit 109M, 2024 benefit 1.08B (DTA recognition on losses), 2025 expense 585M on loss (non-deductible items/valuation adjustments).
data_quality: HIGH for 2024-2025 (from detailed summary statements); 2023 partial (some balance sheet items marked 'N/A' - extracted from 2023 audit report)
data_gaps: P&L 2024 and 2025 complete; balance sheet 2023 incomplete (some asset/liability detail not available in source doc)
audit_opinions: 2024 QUALIFIED (capital adequacy), 2025 likely similar or worse. Bank under regulatory remediation plan.
no_cash_flow_statement: Обобщённая отчётность does not include cash flow statement (per legal note)

regulatory_context: Bank is member of payment systems, securities professional, depository. Under CBR directive for special reporting (2023-2025 suspension of full IFRS publication for sensitive items).
missing_years: 2020-2022 require separate PDF retrieval (not processed; available on primbank.ru)
